picks.title: U.S. Women's National Team v Japan presented by The Home Depot
picks.why: Watch the U.S. Women's National Team take on Japan—world-class soccer at PayPal Park.

picks.title: SJSU Opera Theatre presents a Double Bill: La Voix Humaine and Stuck Elevator at Hammer Theatre Center
picks.why: Free opera about a deliveryman trapped in an elevator for 81 hours—darkly funny and completely original.

picks.title: San Francisco Shakespeare Festival Presents Julius Caesar
picks.why: Shakespeare's Julius Caesar performed outdoors in Cupertino—rarely staged, free, and politically gripping.
